note: BRAIN layer — Day 36 (Sunday). No new replies since 2026-04-04. IMAP gap: 29 days. new_replies.json unchanged. All 5 classifications from Day 35 carried forward unchanged. Warm pipeline: leads 1, 3, 22 remain PRESUMED_LOST_NO_RESPONSE — LinkedIn approach opens TOMORROW Monday 2026-05-04 (IMAP sweep must precede). The absence of new entries in new_replies.json reflects IMAP not having been swept, NOT necessarily a true absence of replies — 29-day IMAP gap means there may be replies sitting unread.
imap_warning: CRITICAL — 29-day IMAP gap. New entries in new_replies.json depend on HANDS running IMAP sweep. Until sweep is completed, reply_classifications.json reflects only what HANDS has collected — not true inbox state. A conversion may exist unread. Priority 1 sweep: leads 3, 22, 1.

action_on_new_reply_found.leads_1_3_22: If IMAP reveals any reply from leads 1, 3, or 22: do NOT approach on LinkedIn. Write new entry to new_replies.json immediately. Re-run BRAIN classifications. If converted: write CHANGELOG.md — Campaign Milestone #1.
action_on_new_reply_found.any_other_lead: Write to new_replies.json. Classify immediately. Update lead status. If unsubscribe: suppress permanently within 24 hours (GDPR).
action_on_new_reply_found.conversion_protocol: Log in CHANGELOG.md — 'Campaign Milestone #1: first revenue — [business], [amount], [date].' Begin delivery same day.

warm_pipeline_resolution.brain_declaration: PRESUMED_LOST_NO_RESPONSE for all three. Email channel closed. LinkedIn opens tomorrow.
warm_pipeline_resolution.imap_precondition: HANDS must IMAP sweep leads 1, 3, 22 before any LinkedIn approach. If reply found: respond to that; skip LinkedIn.

summary.imap_warning: 29-day gap — classified replies may not reflect true inbox state. Sweep before any action.
summary.hands_instructions: 1. IMAP sweep leads 3, 22, 1 FIRST (before 09:00 Monday). 2. If any conversion found: write CHANGELOG.md immediately — Campaign Milestone #1. Do NOT approach on LinkedIn if IMAP reveals a reply. 3. Full IMAP sweep: all cohort leads (09:00-10:00 Monday). 4. Write any new replies to new_replies.json immediately. 5. LinkedIn approach for leads 1, 3, 22 from 10:00 Monday if IMAP confirms no pending reply — see value_delivery_queue.json for connection notes.
